title: VARIETY
technique: A rainbow fan wordmark uses stepped color wedges, mirrored dither, and a fine white tagline.
composition: The upper wordmark arcs from left to right; a lower reflection-like band and wide black gaps preserve focus.
quality: Excellent color choreography: many hues read as one controlled spectrum instead of independent decorations.
summary: Rainbow wordmark: stepped spectrum wedges, reflected dither, and a restrained white tagline.
